name: fluxcd
explanation: FluxCD is a Kubernetes GitOps controller (helm-controller, kustomize-controller, source-controller, notification-controller). Each controller exposes Prometheus metrics on a fixed, well-known port (8080) and path (`/metrics`), as documented in the README and reflected in the typical autodiscovery template (`http://%%host%%:8080/metrics`). The check is a thin `OpenMetricsBaseCheckV2` subclass with a single required field (`openmetrics_endpoint`) and no auth surface. This matches pattern A (`openmetrics-port-scan`) cleanly.
notes: No auto_conf.yaml ships, but the README's pod-annotation example serves as the canonical template. Discovery should target Flux pods by label (`app.kubernetes.io/part-of=flux` or controller-specific labels) and probe :8080/metrics.
